summary: The test suite test_tcl failed during the pytest run (2 failures), causing the overall CI job to fail.
root_cause: The test module test_tcl failed (2 failures) during the test run, and one failed test was re-run but the test suite remained failing.

evidence.reason: Shows that the test_tcl test module failed with two test failures.

evidence.quote: Re-running 1 failed tests in verbose mode in subprocesses
evidence.reason: Indicates pytest attempted to re-run the failed test(s) to get more details, confirming a test failure rather than a compile or install error.
Shows overall test run recorded failures, confirming the job failed due to test failures.
The command used to run the tests identifies the test runner used to reproduce the failure locally.
Shows that rerunning the failed test did not resolve the failure and the test remained failing.

suggested_fix: Reproduce the failure locally by running the same test runner on the built interpreter, e.g. run D:\a\cpython\cpython\PCbuild\amd64\python_d.exe -u -W error -bb -E -m test test_tcl -v to get the failing test names and full tracebacks, then investigate and fix the failing test(s).
